entries.parsedImagePrompt: Medium shot, eye-level angle, static frame. 2 distinct characters with completely different outfits and features, standing separately with clear space between them: On the left of the frame, a young man approximately twenty-five years old with a defined jaw, high nose, brows perpetually furrowed, stern look, sharp almond-shaped eyes, thin lips, short black side-parted hair, tall and slender, dressed in a light blue shirt, gray trousers, and black shoes, stands rigidly with his arms straight at his sides and feet planted firmly on the light oak floor, his narrowed gaze fixed ahead and jaw clenched; while on the right of the frame, a young woman approximately twenty years old with a heart-shaped face, large double-lidded almond eyes, slender arched brows, small straight nose, full lips, long black hair, slim build, and moderate height, wearing a pink t-shirt, light blue denim shorts, and white canvas sneakers, sits sideways on a gray fabric sofa with her arms crossed tightly over her chest, her lower lip pushed out in a defiant pout and eyes rolled slightly upward, her weight shifted to one hip. The background is a bright living room with a large window on the left wall letting in daylight through motionless sheer white curtains that are half-drawn, an entrance door frame slightly visible in the foreground, a standing electric fan in the center of the room, a wooden coffee table with magazines in front of the sofa, and a flat-screen TV on a wooden TV cabinet against the far wall, with the white ceiling light off and light oak wooden floor extending across the open space. Side lighting from the right window casts a warm natural daylight with gentle contrast across the interior, medium depth of field keeping both characters and the immediate foreground in sharp focus. Artwork in cgstyle_9b, ultimate CG texture with Iray skin rendering, realistic physical light and shadow, transparent and deep imagery, translucent rosy smooth skin texture, anime-to-CG transformation, high-detail skin surface, cinematic render quality, 2.5D semi-realistic style.
entries.parsedVideoPrompt:
[Scene] The living room is static and motionless, bathed in warm, steady daylight primarily from the right side, creating a gentle contrast. A large window on the left wall is visible with sheer white curtains hanging motionless and half-drawn. The entrance door frame sits slightly visible in the foreground. A standing electric fan occupies the center of the room. On the right, a gray fabric sofa and wooden coffee table with magazines face the far wall where a flat-screen TV rests on a wooden TV cabinet. The white ceiling light is off, and the light oak wooden floor stretches across the open space. Not a single element moves or shifts in lighting.
[Characters] Tiểu Hy: a young woman approximately twenty years old, with a heart-shaped face, large double-lidded almond eyes, slender arched brows, small straight nose, full lips, long black hair, slim build, moderate height, wearing a pink t-shirt, light blue denim shorts, white canvas sneakers. Defiant and unconvinced.
Bạch Dương: a young man approximately twenty-five years old, with a defined jaw, high nose, brows perpetually furrowed, stern look, sharp almond-shaped eyes, thin lips, short black side-parted hair, tall, slender, wearing a light blue shirt, gray trousers, black shoes. Annoyed and rigid.
Shot 1 (Medium Two-Shot, 2.58s): Static camera, environment remains completely still.
Tiểu Hy: "Brother Bach, do you still have designs on me?"
Action: Slow-motion. On the right side, Tiểu Hy's defiant pout deepens slightly as she begins her retort, her arms tightening subtly around her chest. On the left side, Bạch Dương remains statue-still, his narrowed gaze locked on her, the rigid line of his jaw tightening fractionally.
